title: IntersectionRoute
description: Represents the contextual lanes that overlap or intersect an intersection route lane

sourceConnectionId.description: The laneconnection id of the intersection entry point

sinkConnectionId.description: The laneconnection id of the intersection exit point

intersectionRouteSegments.description: ordered list of route segments to get from source connection to sink connection

defaultSignal.description: Default signal for the intersection route.
